label: Recent grad with a CS degree, looking for first full-time role
resume_text:
Jordan Lee
jordan.lee@example.com | (555) 234-5678 | linkedin.com/in/jordan-lee-example

EDUCATION
State University, B.S. Computer Science (2021-2025)
GPA 3.7/4.0
Relevant coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Operating Systems, Databases, Software Engineering, Introduction to Machine Learning

EXPERIENCE
Software Engineering Intern, MidSize Tech Co. (Summer 2024)
- Built REST API endpoints in Python for an internal reporting dashboard used by 30+ employees
- Contributed to migration from a monolithic backend to a microservices architecture using Docker
- Wrote unit and integration tests achieving 85% coverage on new modules
- Tools: Python, FastAPI, Postgres, Docker

Software Engineering Intern, Local Startup (Summer 2023)
- Implemented a customer-facing notifications feature in a Node.js + React codebase
- Wrote internal documentation and onboarding guide adopted by later interns
- Tools: TypeScript, React, Node.js, Postgres

Teaching Assistant, Data Structures (2023-2024)
- Led weekly office hours for 40+ students; graded weekly assignments and exams
- Created supplementary study materials and practice problems

PROJECTS
Real-time Chat Application (University Capstone) - Full-stack TypeScript app with WebSocket-based messaging. React frontend, Node.js backend, PostgreSQL storage. Deployed on AWS EC2 with NGINX reverse proxy.
Open-source Contributions to Logging Library (3 PRs merged) - Added support for structured JSON output formatting, fixed a memory leak in long-running session contexts, wrote documentation for new configuration options.

SKILLS
Languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Java, SQL
Frameworks: React, Node.js, FastAPI, Express, Next.js
Tools: Git, Docker, AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda), PostgreSQL, Redis
Testing: Jest, pytest, integration testing patterns
